issue_summary: Update removeExtension method and remove unused code from FilenameUtils
javadoc_before:
/** * Remove extension from filename. * ie * 
     * foo.txt    --> foo
     * a\b\c.jpg --> a\b\c
     * a\b\c     --> a\b\c
     * a.b\c        --> a.b\c
     *
* * @param filename the filename * @return the filename minus extension */
javadoc_after:
/** * Removes the extension from a filename. *

* This method returns the textual part of the filename before the last dot. * There must be no directory separator after the dot. * 

     * foo.txt    --> foo
     * a\b\c.jpg --> a\b\c
     * a\b\c     --> a\b\c
     * a.b\c        --> a.b\c
     *
* * @param filename the filename to query, null returns null * @return the filename minus the extension */
